User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user in the system, acting as a link to an external authentication system. This entity does not store authentication credentials like passwords, emails, or phone numbers directly.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity. This ID would typically be provided by an external authentication system.

userRole.description: The primary role of the user within the MediFlow application (e.g., 'Patient', 'Doctor', 'Pharmacist', 'Admin').

Family.title: Family
Family.description: Represents a group of patient profiles managed by a single user, typically for multi-family profile management.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Family entity.

familyName.description: The name of the family group (e.g., 'Smith Family').

ownerUserId.description: Reference to the User entity who is the primary manager of this family profile. (Relationship: User 1:N Family)

patientProfileIds.description: An array of references to PatientProfile entities that belong to this family. (Relationship: Family N:N PatientProfile)

PatientProfile.title: PatientProfile
PatientProfile.description: Represents an individual patient, potentially part of a family or managed by a caretaker.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PatientProfile entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User entity associated with this patient profile. (Relationship: User 1:1 PatientProfile)

familyId.description: Optional reference to the Family entity this patient profile belongs to. (Relationship: Family 1:N PatientProfile)

firstName.description: The first name of the patient.

lastName.description: The last name of the patient.

caretakerUserId.description: Optional reference to the User entity who manages this patient's profile (e.g., for children or elderly members). (Relationship: User 1:N PatientProfile)

emergencyContactName.description: The name of the emergency contact person for the patient.

emergencyContactNumber.description: The phone number of the emergency contact person for the patient.

DoctorProfile.title: DoctorProfile
DoctorProfile.description: Represents a registered doctor with their professional details and availability.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DoctorProfile entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User entity associated with this doctor profile. (Relationship: User 1:1 DoctorProfile)

firstName.description: The first name of the doctor.

lastName.description: The last name of the doctor.

specialization.description: The medical specialization of the doctor (e.g., 'Cardiologist', 'Pediatrician').

clinicName.description: The name of the clinic or hospital where the doctor practices.

clinicAddress.description: The address of the doctor's clinic or hospital.

availabilitySlotIds.description: An array of references to DoctorAvailabilitySlot entities indicating when the doctor is available for appointments. (Relationship: DoctorProfile N:N DoctorAvailabilitySlot)

PharmacistProfile.title: PharmacistProfile
PharmacistProfile.description: Represents a registered pharmacist with their professional and pharmacy details.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PharmacistProfile entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User entity associated with this pharmacist profile. (Relationship: User 1:1 PharmacistProfile)

firstName.description: The first name of the pharmacist.

lastName.description: The last name of the pharmacist.

pharmacyName.description: The name of the pharmacy where the pharmacist works.

inventoryItemIds.description: An array of references to MedicineInventoryItem entities managed by this pharmacist. (Relationship: PharmacistProfile N:N MedicineInventoryItem)

MedicalHistory.title: MedicalHistory
MedicalHistory.description: Stores detailed medical history for a specific patient profile.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MedicalHistory entity.

patientProfileId.description: Reference to the PatientProfile this medical history belongs to. (Relationship: PatientProfile 1:N MedicalHistory)

conditionName.description: The name of a medical condition or diagnosis.

diagnosisDate.description: The date when the condition was diagnosed.

treatmentDetails.description: Details about the treatment received for the condition.

isChronic.description: Indicates if the condition is chronic.

allergies.description: A list of known allergies for the patient.

pastProcedures.description: A list of past medical procedures or surgeries for the patient.

notes.description: Additional relevant notes about the medical history.

SymptomEntry.title: SymptomEntry
SymptomEntry.description: Records patient-entered symptoms for AI-based doctor recommendations.

id.description: Unique identifier for the SymptomEntry entity.

patientProfileId.description: Reference to the PatientProfile who entered these symptoms. (Relationship: PatientProfile 1:N SymptomEntry)

symptomsDescription.description: A detailed description of the symptoms reported by the patient.

entryDate.description: The date and time when the symptoms were entered.

recommendedDoctorProfileIds.description: An array of references to DoctorProfile entities recommended by the AI based on the symptoms. (Relationship: SymptomEntry N:N DoctorProfile)

aiRecommendationNotes.description: Any additional notes or rationale provided by the AI for the recommendation.

Appointment.title: Appointment
Appointment.description: Records a scheduled consultation between a patient and a doctor.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Appointment entity.

patientProfileId.description: Reference to the PatientProfile who booked the appointment. (Relationship: PatientProfile 1:N Appointment)

doctorProfileId.description: Reference to the DoctorProfile with whom the appointment is booked. (Relationship: DoctorProfile 1:N Appointment)

doctorAvailabilitySlotId.description: Reference to the specific DoctorAvailabilitySlot that was booked for this appointment. (Relationship: DoctorAvailabilitySlot 1:1 Appointment)

appointmentDateTime.description: The exact date and time of the appointment.

status.description: The current status of the appointment (e.g., 'Scheduled', 'Completed', 'Cancelled', 'PendingPayment').

paymentTransactionId.description: Optional reference to the PaymentTransaction entity related to this appointment's payment. (Relationship: PaymentTransaction 1:N Appointment)

notes.description: Any additional notes for the appointment.

Prescription.title: Prescription
Prescription.description: Represents a digital prescription issued by a doctor for a patient.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Prescription entity.

patientProfileId.description: Reference to the PatientProfile for whom this prescription is issued. (Relationship: PatientProfile 1:N Prescription)

doctorProfileId.description: Reference to the DoctorProfile who issued this prescription. (Relationship: DoctorProfile 1:N Prescription)

issueDate.description: The date and time when the prescription was issued.

prescriptionMedicationIds.description: An array of references to PrescriptionMedication entities detailing each medicine in the prescription. (Relationship: Prescription N:N PrescriptionMedication)

generalInstructions.description: General instructions or advice from the doctor for the patient.

isVerifiedByPharmacist.description: Indicates if the prescription has been verified by a pharmacist for fulfillment.

pharmacistProfileId.description: Optional reference to the PharmacistProfile who verified this prescription. (Relationship: PharmacistProfile 1:N Prescription)

verificationDate.description: The date and time when the prescription was verified by the pharmacist.

PrescriptionMedication.title: PrescriptionMedication
PrescriptionMedication.description: Details a single medication item within a prescription, including dosage and schedule information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PrescriptionMedication entity.

prescriptionId.description: Reference to the Prescription this medication item belongs to. (Relationship: Prescription 1:N PrescriptionMedication)

medicineName.description: The name of the prescribed medicine.

dosageValue.description: The numerical value of the dosage (e.g., 250 for 250mg).

frequencyQuantity.description: The number of times the medicine should be taken within a frequency unit (e.g., 2 times a day).

frequencyUnit.description: The unit of frequency for medication intake (e.g., 'daily', 'weekly', 'hourly').

instructions.description: Specific instructions for taking the medicine (e.g., 'after food', 'empty stomach').

durationInDays.description: The total duration for which the medicine should be taken, in days.

startDate.description: The start date for the medication course.

endDate.description: The end date for the medication course.

MedicationSchedule.title: MedicationSchedule
MedicationSchedule.description: Represents an automatically generated medication regimen for a patient, derived from a prescription medication.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MedicationSchedule entity.

patientProfileId.description: Reference to the PatientProfile for whom this schedule is created. (Relationship: PatientProfile 1:N MedicationSchedule)

prescriptionMedicationId.description: Reference to the PrescriptionMedication entity from which this schedule was generated. (Relationship: PrescriptionMedication 1:N MedicationSchedule)

medicineName.description: The name of the medicine for this schedule.

dosageDetails.description: A descriptive string of the dosage (e.g., '250mg, after food').

scheduleTimes.description: An array of time strings representing the daily scheduled times for taking the medicine (e.g., ['08:00', '14:00', '20:00']).

startDate.description: The start date for this medication schedule.

endDate.description: The end date for this medication schedule.

isActive.description: Indicates if the medication reminders for this schedule are currently active.

medicationAlertIds.description: An array of references to individual MedicationAlert entities generated for this schedule. (Relationship: MedicationSchedule N:N MedicationAlert)

complianceRecordIds.description: An array of references to MedicationComplianceRecord entities tracking doses for this schedule. (Relationship: MedicationSchedule N:N MedicationComplianceRecord)

MedicationAlert.title: MedicationAlert
MedicationAlert.description: Represents a specific instance of a medication reminder generated from a medication schedule.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MedicationAlert entity.

medicationScheduleId.description: Reference to the MedicationSchedule that generated this alert. (Relationship: MedicationSchedule 1:N MedicationAlert)

alertTime.description: The exact date and time when this specific alert was scheduled to fire.

isSent.description: Indicates if the notification for this alert has been sent.

isTaken.description: Indicates if the patient marked this dose as taken.

takenTime.description: The date and time when the dose was marked as taken (if applicable).

status.description: The current status of the alert (e.g., 'Scheduled', 'Sent', 'Taken', 'Missed', 'Snoozed').

repeatedAlertCount.description: The number of times this alert has been repeated due to the dose not being taken.

MedicationComplianceRecord.title: MedicationComplianceRecord
MedicationComplianceRecord.description: Tracks the compliance of a patient in taking a specific dose of medication at a scheduled time.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MedicationComplianceRecord entity.

medicationScheduleId.description: Reference to the MedicationSchedule this compliance record is for. (Relationship: MedicationSchedule 1:N MedicationComplianceRecord)

patientProfileId.description: Reference to the PatientProfile associated with this compliance record. (Relationship: PatientProfile 1:N MedicationComplianceRecord)

scheduledDoseTime.description: The exact date and time the medication dose was scheduled to be taken.

actualTakenTime.description: The actual date and time the medication dose was marked as taken, if applicable.

status.description: The compliance status for this dose (e.g., 'Taken', 'Missed', 'Skipped', 'Pending').

notes.description: Any additional notes or reasons for missed/skipped doses.

Bill.title: Bill
Bill.description: Records financial bills generated for patients, such as consultation or pharmacy bills.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Bill entity.

patientProfileId.description: Reference to the PatientProfile to whom this bill is issued. (Relationship: PatientProfile 1:N Bill)

issuerType.description: The type of entity that issued the bill (e.g., 'Doctor', 'Pharmacist').

issuerProfileId.description: Reference to the DoctorProfile or PharmacistProfile that issued this bill, depending on 'issuerType'. (Relationship: DoctorProfile/PharmacistProfile 1:N Bill)

amount.description: The total amount of the bill.

currency.description: The currency of the bill amount (e.g., 'USD', 'INR').

issueDate.description: The date and time when the bill was issued.

dueDate.description: The due date for the bill payment.

description.description: A brief description or summary of the bill.

paymentTransactionId.description: Optional reference to the PaymentTransaction entity if this bill has been paid. (Relationship: PaymentTransaction 1:N Bill)

status.description: The payment status of the bill (e.g., 'Unpaid', 'Paid', 'PartiallyPaid', 'Cancelled').

PaymentTransaction.title: PaymentTransaction
PaymentTransaction.description: Records details of a financial transaction made by a patient within the application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PaymentTransaction entity.

patientProfileId.description: Reference to the PatientProfile who initiated the payment. (Relationship: PatientProfile 1:N PaymentTransaction)

transactionDate.description: The date and time when the transaction occurred.

paymentMethod.description: The method used for the payment (e.g., 'Credit Card', 'UPI', 'Wallet').

relatedBillId.description: Optional reference to the Bill entity that this payment transaction is settling. (Relationship: Bill 1:1 PaymentTransaction)

transactionReference.description: A unique reference ID provided by the payment gateway or system.

MedicineInventoryItem.title: MedicineInventoryItem
MedicineInventoryItem.description: Represents a single medicine item in a pharmacy's inventory, managed by a pharmacist.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MedicineInventoryItem entity.

pharmacistProfileId.description: Reference to the PharmacistProfile who manages this inventory item. (Relationship: PharmacistProfile 1:N MedicineInventoryItem)

medicineName.description: The commercial or generic name of the medicine.

batchNumber.description: The batch number of the medicine stock.

expiryDate.description: The expiry date of the medicine batch.

stockQuantity.description: The current quantity of the medicine in stock.

unitPrice.description: The price per unit of the medicine.

lastUpdated.description: The date and time when the inventory item was last updated.

DoctorAvailabilitySlot.title: DoctorAvailabilitySlot
DoctorAvailabilitySlot.description: Represents a specific time slot when a doctor is available for an appointment.

id.description: Unique identifier for the DoctorAvailabilitySlot entity.

doctorProfileId.description: Reference to the DoctorProfile to whom this availability slot belongs. (Relationship: DoctorProfile 1:N DoctorAvailabilitySlot)

slotStartDateTime.description: The start date and time of the availability slot.

slotEndDateTime.description: The end date and time of the availability slot.

isBooked.boolean: Indicates if this slot has been booked for an appointment.

bookedAppointmentId.description: Optional reference to the Appointment entity that booked this slot, if 'isBooked' is true. (Relationship: Appointment 1:1 DoctorAvailabilitySlot)

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique identifier for the user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The ID of the owner user.

params.name: patientProfileId
params.description: The ID for the patient profile.

params.name: doctorProfileId
params.description: The ID for the doctor profile.
